zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Goushill於1355年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆時，他的父親Nicholas Goushill39歲，母親Joan FitzRichard28歲。他於1401年9月1日與Elizabeth FitzAlan在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1403年7月2日到1404年7月21日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Goushill于1355年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆时，他的父亲Nicholas Goushill39岁，母亲Joan FitzRichard28岁。他于1401年9月1日与Elizabeth FitzAlan在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1403年7月2日到1404年7月21日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Goushill was born in 1355, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Nicholas Goushill, was 39 and his mother, Joan FitzRichard, was 28. He married Elizabeth FitzAlan on 1 September 1401, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died from 2 July 1403 to 21 July 1404, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Goushill est né en 1355, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Goushill, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzRichard, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzAlan le 1 septembre 1401, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 2 juillet 1403 au 21 juillet 1404, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Goushill 1355 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Goushill 39 und seine Mutter Joan FitzRichard 28. Er hat am 1. September 1401 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 2. Juli 1403 bis 21. Juli 1404 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Goushill è nato il nel 1355 nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Goushill, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan FitzRichard, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzAlan il 1 settembre 1401, nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì da 2 luglio 1403 a 21 luglio 1404, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Goushillが1355年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムで生まれた時，父Nicholas Goushillは39歳，母Joan FitzRichardは28歳であった。1401年9月1日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムでElizabeth FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1403年7月2日まで1404年7月21日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Goushill(이)가 1355년 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Goushill(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzRichard(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1401년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 Elizabeth FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 2일부터 1404년 7월 21일까지 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Goushill nasceu em 1355, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Goushill, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzRichard, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzAlan em 1 de setembro de 1401, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu de 2 de julho de 1403 a 21 de julho de 1404, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Goushill родился в 1355 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Goushill было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzRichard, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzAlan 1 сентября 1401 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер с 2 июля 1403 по 21 июля 1404 в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth FitzAlan el 1 de septiembre de 1401, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió desde 2 de julio de 1403 hasta 21 de julio de 1404, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
